languages.text: "Разве не ясно? Божественный гнев Его настолько силен, что Он обрекает нас на страдания и после смерти! Нам не было сие известно, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Но теперь... нам остается лишь молить Его о прощении. В разы усерднее".

traits.locale_text: "Разве не ясно? Божественный гнев Его настолько силен, что Он обрекает нас на страдания и после смерти! Нам не было сие известно, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Но теперь... нам остается лишь молить Его о прощении. В разы усерднее".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "Разве не ясно? Божественный гнев Его настолько силен, что Он обрекает нас на страдания и после смерти! Нам не было сие известно, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Но теперь... нам остается лишь молить Его о прощении. В разы усерднее".
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."
languages.original_text: "Разве не ясно? Божественный гнев Его настолько силен, что Он обрекает нас на страдания и после смерти! Нам не было сие известно, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}. Но теперь... нам остается лишь молить Его о прощении. В разы усерднее".

traits.locale_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

traits.locale_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderWoman

languages.text: "Ist das nicht klar? Sein göttlicher Zorn ist so mächtig, dass er uns dazu verdammt hat, sogar im Tod zu leiden! Wir wussten das nicht, o himmlischer Gesandter. Aber jetzt... Alles, was wir tun können, ist, Ihn um Vergebung zu bitten. Und noch mehr Buße tun."
languages.original_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."

languages.text: "Ce n'est pas clair ? Sa colère divine est si puissante qu'il nous a condamnés à souffrir jusque dans la mort ! Nous ne le savions pas, ô Envoyé céleste. Mais maintenant... Tout ce que nous pouvons faire, c'est le supplier de nous pardonner. Et nous repentir davantage."
languages.original_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."

languages.text: "这还不清楚吗？他的神怒是如此强大，他甚至判我们死后受苦！我们不知道这些，天国的使者啊但现在我们只能乞求他的宽恕并更加努力地忏悔"
languages.original_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."

languages.text: "¿No está claro? Su ira divina es tan poderosa que nos ha condenado a sufrir incluso en la muerte. No sabíamos esto, oh Enviado Celestial. Pero ahora... Todo lo que podemos hacer es suplicarle perdón. Y arrepentirnos más".
languages.original_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."

languages.text: 「明らかではない？神の怒りは非常に強力で、私たちに死んでも苦しむよう宣告された！天の使者よ、私たちは知らなかった。しかし今は...私たちにできることは、主に許しを乞うことだけです。そして、より強く悔い改めるのだ。"
languages.original_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."

languages.text: "Bu açık değil mi? O'nun ilahi gazabı o kadar güçlü ki, bizi ölümde bile acı çekmeye mahkûm etti! Bunu bilmiyorduk, ey Cennet Elçisi. Ama şimdi... Tek yapabileceğimiz bağışlanması için O'na yalvarmak. Ve daha çok tövbe etmek."
languages.original_text: "It is not clear? His divine wrath is so powerful He had condemned us to suffer even in death! We did not know this, o Heavenly Envoy. But now... All we can do is beg Him for forgiveness. And repent harder."
